---
title: "Crossing the Separation Point: Stabilizing Decision-Focused Training with Recursive Variational Free-Energy"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "H. Geng"
  - "H. Xu"
year: 2026
venue: "ICML"
status: "under-review"
type: "first-author"
doi: ""
url: ""
keywords:
  - "decision-focused learning"
  - "training stability"
  - "recursive variational free-energy"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Under Review (ICML 2026)

This manuscript studies unstable dynamics around separation boundaries in decision-focused training and proposes recursive variational free-energy regularization for stable end-to-end optimization.
